name: Trades & Manufacturing
description: You know what safety culture looks like because your industry learned it the hard way. The most powerful technology in history is being built with less safety culture than a building site.
trajectory: Safety protocols and near-miss reporting map directly to AI safety culture and incident reporting — which AI labs barely have.
Knowing when a shortcut will cause a failure is safety standards development — formalising the instincts that prevent disasters.
Making safety non-negotiable in daily work is operational safety frameworks — something the AI field has almost none of.
Your industry built safety infrastructure over decades. AI development needs to learn those lessons in years, not decades.

projects.title: Audit AI safety culture
projects.description: Read one AI company's safety practices and compare them to safety protocols in your trade. Write up what's missing.

projects.title: Cross-domain safety transfer
projects.description: Write about what AI safety can learn from construction site or manufacturing safety culture, including near-miss reporting.

projects.title: Physical AI safety standards
projects.description: Contribute to safety work on AI in robotics, manufacturing, and autonomous vehicles, drawing on your hands-on experience.
